'''''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 24''' was the twenty-fourth issue in the ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'' series of comics. It was released on [[November 5]], [[1997]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]], and reprinted in 2007 as part of a [[Hasbro]] action figure promotion featuring [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Baron Fel]] and [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Hobbie Klivian]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Baron Fel's wingmen—the merciless pilots of the Imperial 181st Fighter Division—are falling to the firepower of Rogue Squadron. But Fel himself is not down. He has a final card to play, and Wedge Antilles is about to fold!''
